description: ID4 (Rota) — Entropy Is the Record of Truth. The logarithm is the unique measure. RET formalized in Lean 4. The bridge between physics and computation.
header:
# EGPT — ID4: Rota's Idea (Entropy Is the Record of Truth)

> The logarithm is the unique measure; physics, computation, and information share one foundation.
> This file contains all primary artifacts for Idea #4.
> For the full framework: https://eabadir.github.io/EGPT/IDEAS.md
>
> Key claim: All entropy functions satisfying 7 natural axioms are C × Shannon entropy.
> Rota proved this in his unpublished 400-page MIT textbook (1970s-1999).
> Formalized here in Lean 4: 7 axioms proven constructively for Shannon entropy.

files.note: 7 Rota axioms proven for Shannon entropy
RET proof infrastructure — monotonicity, conditional additivity
Rota's entropy derivation in his own words (PDF — will be skipped by generator)
Allegory: physicist, mathematician, CS, auditor — Rota meets Goldratt
